race.comment: HIGHWAY ROBBERY (10) was a big drifter in betting, though he was very strong late in the race to be 1.5L off the winner at the finish with the jockey suggesting he didn't enjoy the kickback. A better draw and a rise in trip suit and with improvement on the cards, he can notch up a maiden win. TIMELESS GRACE (7) is hard to knock on recent form, racing well without winning. She disappointed here last time out, but comes back to 1750m this time which may suit. Can sit much closer this time and can get the job done. SUNBURNT COUNTRY (1) went around the outside and scored an impressive win here over 1900m. Will need a touch more luck from the inside barrier this time, but his latest win makes him hard to ignore. O CARA MIA (2) comes back to a firmer deck this time third-up into the campaign. Can improve now. TURN LEFT (3) is another who can improve after only a fair effort here last start.
